form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a neck second (22.87) over 400m at this track. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a neck second (22.87) over 400m at this track. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on rounding the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Reborn Mystique beaten 5.5 lengths (23.22). Has the ability to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Reborn Mystique beaten 5.5 lengths (23.22). Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 22.85 with a neck win at this track over 400m. Has returned in winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 22.85 with a neck win at this track over 400m. Has returned in winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Struggling for consistency at present. Last start finished 4th on April 7 over 388m at Gosford behind Ava's Bluey beaten 5 lengths (22.93) in a Grade 5. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Struggling for consistency at present. Last start finished 4th on April 7 over 388m at Gosford behind Ava's Bluey beaten 5 lengths (22.93) in a Grade 5. Looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 400m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 400m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.06) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten a nose. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Makes strong appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (23.06) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten a nose. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Makes strong appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered in the front straight and bumped.
Came together entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (23.14) at this track over 400m. Rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (23.14) at this track over 400m. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 7 over 388m at Gosford behind Federal Senor beaten 10 lengths (22.85) in a Grade 5. Has claims if at her best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th on April 7 over 388m at Gosford behind Federal Senor beaten 10 lengths (22.85) in a Grade 5. Has claims if at her best.

form.formComment: Country racer who only starts fairly, coming off mixed results. Was 8th last start over 324m at Richmond Straight (18.05) beaten 5.5 lengths, behind Noir in Grade 5 on April 2. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Country racer who only starts fairly, coming off mixed results. Was 8th last start over 324m at Richmond Straight (18.05) beaten 5.5 lengths, behind Noir in Grade 5 on April 2. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Carried wide rounding the turn into the back straight.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 388m at Gosford. Other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 388m at Gosford. Other runners look much more appealing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on through the first turn, stumbled and lost momentum.
Made contact with the running rail rounding the turn into the front straight.
